TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Gus_Bailey, title = Gus_Bailey, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gus_Bailey} }

S.FORM: Gus Bailey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951 , ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 2, Gus Bailey, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1988) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Gus Bailey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951 , ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 2, Gus Bailey, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1988) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ɣus~ɕ βailej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ɣus~ɕ βailej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
